steps.title: Identify the required comparison
steps.content: To emphasize how many islands have dragons, the sentence must show the contrast between islands with dragons (4) and total islands (29) in the park.

steps.title: Choose the sentence with both numbers
steps.content: Choice C provides exactly this: “Only four of the twenty-nine islands...” It presents both numbers and uses only to emphasize the proportion. The other choices either omit specific numbers or ignore the dragon-island relationship. That matches choice C — C is correct.
